title: px86's Super Optimized
description: The best high performance optimized modpack for maximum FPS!
body:
# px86's Super Optimized

## About
px86's Super Optimized is a high-performance Fabric modpack designed to give the highest performance possible with minimal mods.

## Improvements
✅ Optimized Gameplay – Many performance tweaks.

✅ Minimalist Mod List – Never over 30 mods.

## Support
Running into issues? DM `px86` on Discord.
